summary: Appointment Calendar Feature Testing Complete - All 20 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Full CRUD operations, double-booking prevention, status management, and filtering all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test appointments during pytest execution. Test client 'Test Client Alpha' (CL-185522) used for all appointment tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Appointment Calendar feature fully tested and working. All features verified: 1) Create appointment with client association and time slot - PASS. 2) Double-booking prevention (exact overlap, partial overlap) - PASS. 3) Cancelled appointments allow rebooking - PASS. 4) Adjacent (back-to-back) appointments allowed - PASS. 5) Update appointment (reschedule time, update notes) - PASS. 6) Mark appointment as completed via POST endpoint - PASS. 7) Cancel appointment via POST endpoint - PASS. 8) Delete appointment - PASS. 9) Filter appointments by status (all/scheduled/completed/cancelled) - PASS. 10) Read-only mode check for active therapist - PASS. 11) Input validation (end time after start, invalid client ID, non-existent appointment) - PASS.

create_appointment.description: Create appointment with client association and time slot
create_appointment.frontend_verified: Create dialog with client dropdown, datetime inputs, notes field

double_booking_prevention.description: Overlapping appointments rejected, cancelled slots allow rebooking

update_appointment.frontend_verified: Edit dialog with time inputs, notes field, status dropdown

complete_appointment.description: Mark appointment as completed via POST endpoint
complete_appointment.frontend_verified: Complete button (checkmark) changes status to Completed

cancel_appointment.frontend_verified: Cancel button (X) changes status to Cancelled with confirmation

filter_by_status.frontend_verified: Filter dropdown correctly filters appointment list

status_validation.description: Cannot complete cancelled or cancel completed appointments

input_validation.description: End time must be after start time, invalid client rejected

subscription_read_only.description: Active therapist can create appointments (not in read-only mode)
